content: {"file": "src/core/linker/component_factory.ts", "summary": "This file contains the implementation of ComponentFactory and ComponentFactoryResolver classes which are used to create instances of components in Angular. It includes methods for resolving component factories, creating components with specified injectors and projectable nodes, and handling dependencies and namespaces.", "rules": [{"name": "Dependency Injection Handling", "description": "Handles dependency injection by using chained injectors to resolve tokens from multiple sources.", "conditions": ["presence of ChainedInjector class"], "actions": ["uses injector and parentInjector to get token values"]}, {"name": "Component Creation Logic", "description": "Manages the creation process of components including setting up templates, views, and rendering elements.", "conditions": ["existence of create method in ComponentFactory class"], "actions": ["creates component instances with specified projectable nodes and injectors"]}], "dependencies": ["RendererFactory2", "Sanitizer", "AfterRenderEventManager", "ChangeDetectionScheduler"]}
